auto_advance — --chain triggers Skill(gsd-plan-phase, '80 --auto') per chain.md step 5

pause_reason: User went to bed. Clean pause mid-Area-3 (drift-guard mechanism) — Area 3 had been announced but no question asked yet. Resume should immediately ask the first Area-3 question.

decisions.decision: GROUND-TRUTH FINDING: db_connect() at repo.py:18-21 already sets PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON
decisions.rationale: Confirmed via git log -L 17,21:musicstreamer/repo.py — original Phase 01-01 commit 59fc516 already had the PRAGMA. The Phase 74 F-07-03 Synphaera orphans came from a manual sqlite3-shell DELETE that bypassed db_connect, NOT a code bug. So Phase 80 is mostly: lock in existing PRAGMA via regression test + docstring, clean up pre-existing orphans, drift-guard future bypasses.

decisions.decision: FK child tables actually at risk: station_streams + station_siblings ONLY
decisions.rationale: Audited repo.py:60-82. Favorites has NO FK to stations (uses TEXT station_name, v1.3 FAVES design). stations.provider_id uses ON DELETE SET NULL not CASCADE (no orphan, dangling ref only). Two real cascade-leak surfaces.

decisions.decision: Sweep action: delete orphans + INFO-log per-table counts ONLY when N>0
decisions.rationale: Self-healing; clean normal-launch log; matches Phase 79 youtube-resolve INFO-line philosophy (log when interesting, silent otherwise)

decisions.decision: Sweep home: separate sweep_orphans(con) function called from __main__._run_gui after db_init()
decisions.rationale: Clean separation of schema migration vs runtime data hygiene; testable in isolation; matches focused-tiny-module convention (cookie_utils, url_helpers, runtime_check, subprocess_utils, yt_dlp_opts). User chose this over 'idempotent block at end of db_init()' and 'one-shot CLI script'.

decisions.decision: Run cadence: every app start (no user_version gate, no settings flag)
decisions.rationale: Sub-millisecond when N=0 (two SELECT COUNT(*) on indexed station_id columns); user_version gating would let future drift leak silently forever once bumped; settings flag is premature flexibility for a feature that doesn't need a knob

decisions.decision: N=0 logging: silent (no log line when sweep finds zero orphans)
decisions.rationale: Keeps normal-launch log clean; INFO line is the alert signal when N>0. Rejected: 'always log 0/0' (noisy) and 'DEBUG on N=0 / INFO on N>0' (overcomplicated).

User chose narrow scope. Favorites soft-sweep rejected — would change documented v1.3 FAVES-01..04 'track titles persist after station delete' behavior. Generic PRAGMA foreign_key_list introspection rejected — over-engineered for two known tables.

decisions.decision: station_siblings sweep: single DELETE handles both a_id and b_id orphans atomically
decisions.rationale: DELETE FROM station_siblings WHERE a_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM stations) OR b_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM stations). One INFO log line. User doesn't care which column orphaned the row — it's dead either way.

decisions.decision: Provider FK orphans: out of scope (skip)
decisions.rationale: stations.provider_id is ON DELETE SET NULL — produces dangling refs not orphans (harmless; UI shows 'no provider'); no provider-deletion UI surface today; revisit only if downstream bugs surface.

uncommitted_files: uv.lock (pre-existing modification, not introduced this session)
next_action: Resume /gsd-discuss-phase 80 --chain — read 80-DISCUSS-CHECKPOINT.json + this HANDOFF, then announce Area 3 'Drift-guard mechanism' and ask first question. Recommended option to lead with (per feedback_gstreamer_mock_blind_spot.md memory): BOTH a once-per-session log inside db_connect() if PRAGMA==OFF AND a source-grep test that bans sqlite3.connect outside repo.db_connect (mirrors tests/test_packaging_spec.py shape).
context_notes: Phase 80 = SQLite FK enforcement (BUG-10, surfaced 2026-05-14 Phase 74 F-07-03). Workflow is /gsd-discuss-phase --chain — interactive discuss, then auto-advance to plan-phase. Default-mode discussion (one question at a time, ~4 per area, then 'more or next?'). Two of four areas resolved with 7 sub-decisions locked. After remaining two areas + final wrap, CONTEXT.md gets written, then chain.md auto-advances to Skill(gsd-plan-phase, '80 --auto'). The 80-DISCUSS-CHECKPOINT.json mirrors the in-memory decisions accumulator and will be deleted by git_commit step after CONTEXT.md write.
